posts.author: penguin11 (JR Ariate)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I encountered a problem in timeline integration using this formula TIMELINE({Column 1}, {Column 2}). The date reflected in timeline column is somewhat correct but not. Ex. The Timeline column shows “May 16, '23 - Jun 7, '23” but when I place my cursor on timeline it shows “-730462d” and not “23d” for the days difference.

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: Shaul_Klarman (Shaul Klarman)
posts.cookedHtml: Still need help?
